info.title: Operations Center — Products API
info.description:
**Products** represent inputs (seed varieties, chemicals, fertilizers, tank mixes, dry blends) used in **Operations Center**. Use these endpoints to **list**, **create**, **update**, and **associate** reference catalog items for an organization.

**Accept / Content-Type:** `application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json` for JSON bodies and responses.

**Paging:** Collections may use **CollectionPage** (`total`, `links`, `values`). Use **`itemLimit`** (multiples of **10**, max **100**) and **`pageOffset`** where supported.

**OAuth:** Read operations typically require **`eq1`**; create/update operations require **`eq2`** (Equipment access — Setup File Creator, Products, WDT). Complete **connections** when **GET** `/platform/organizations` returns a **`connections`** link.

**Links:** Responses may include HATEOAS **`links`**. Use **`showLinks=none`** to trim payloads.

tags.name: Varieties
tags.description: Organization varieties and reference catalog varieties.

tags.name: Chemicals
tags.description: Organization chemicals and reference catalog chemicals.

tags.name: Fertilizers
tags.description: Organization fertilizers and reference catalog fertilizers.

tags.name: Product companies
tags.description: Unified product company list for an organization.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Product document metadata with embedded PDF.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow. Product endpoints require **`eq1`** (read) and/or **`eq2`** (write). Use **`offline_access`** for refresh tokens.

scopes.eq1: Equipment — view; Setup File Creator, Products, WDT
scopes.eq2: Equipment — edit; Setup File Creator, Products, WDT

AxiomResource.description: Axiom v3 resource; fields vary by type.

get.description:
Retrieves a collection of **varieties** for the organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size when the response is a CollectionPage: multiples of 10, max 100.

parameters.name: showLinks
parameters.description: Omit links with `none`, or filter to specific `rel` values.

post.description:
Adds a **custom variety** to the organization. **name+cropName** must be unique. **cropName** must be a supported crop (see **`/cropTypes`**). Client-supplied **`id`** enables offline create (**201** or **409** if id exists).

**OAuth scope:** **`eq2`**

409.description: Conflict — resource with client `id` already exists.

get.description:
Returns the variety with the given **erid**.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size when the response is a CollectionPage: multiples of 10, max 100.

parameters.name: showLinks
parameters.description: Omit links with `none`, or filter to specific `rel` values.

put.description:
Rename, archive/unarchive, or change manufacturer or crop type.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq2`**

post.summary: Associate a reference variety to an organization
post.description:
Associates a **reference** variety from the global catalog to your organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq2`**

get.description:
Searches the **reference** catalog (max **100** results). **Either** `searchString`, `productName`, or `brandName` is required. If `productName` or `brandName` is set, `searchString` is ignored.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**

parameters.name: searchString
parameters.description: Search term (matches name or companyName). Ignored if `productName` or `brandName` is set.

parameters.name: productName
parameters.description: Exact match to company name (per platform behavior).

parameters.name: brandName
parameters.description: Exact match to company name; case sensitive.

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size when the response is a CollectionPage: multiples of 10, max 100.

parameters.name: showLinks
parameters.description: Omit links with `none`, or filter to specific `rel` values.

get.description:
Single variety from industry data sources (e.g. CDMS).

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**

get.summary: Reference documents for a seed variety
get.description:
Documents for the variety from industry sources.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**

patch.summary: Set organization overrides for a reference variety
patch.description:
Sets **isCarrier**, **archived**, **registration**, and other overrides when importing a reference variety.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq2`**

Adds a **custom** chemical to the organization. See product documentation for **carrier**, **type**, and offline **`id`** semantics (**201** / **409**).

**OAuth scope:** **`eq2`**

get.description:
Returns all available **active ingredients**.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/isg/activeIngredients`

Document metadata with embedded **gzip+base64** PDF payload.

**OAuth scope:** **`eq1`**
